name: auto-merge-dependabot.yml
purpose: Auto-merges Dependabot minor/patch PRs when CI passes; blocks major version bumps for manual review.
notes: No project-specific secrets beyond GITHUB_TOKEN (built-in). Pure GitHub Actions infra; portable to any repo.

name: cleanup-branches.yml
purpose: Deletes merged branches older than 7 days on a weekly Monday schedule; skips protected branch patterns (main, develop, release/).
notes: Protected-branch skip patterns (main, develop, release/) are universal. No project-specific paths or secrets.

name: codeql.yml
purpose: Deep semantic security analysis of JavaScript/TypeScript via GitHub CodeQL; runs on push/PR to main and weekly.
notes: Language hardcoded to javascript-typescript. Adapt language if consuming repo uses another stack. No project secrets required (uses GITHUB_TOKEN implicitly via security-events:write).

name: dependency-review.yml
purpose: Scans new dependencies on PRs for known critical vulnerabilities; comments summary directly in PR.
notes: Fail threshold set to 'critical' — may want to adjust to 'high' for stricter posture. No project-specific secrets.

name: scorecard.yml
purpose: Runs OpenSSF Scorecard supply-chain security scoring on push to main and weekly; uploads SARIF results to GitHub Code Scanning.
notes: publish_results:true sends data to OpenSSF public REST API. Requires id-token:write permission. No SONAR_TOKEN or project-specific secrets — portable.

name: semgrep.yml
purpose: Static analysis with Semgrep using --config auto ruleset; runs in pinned Docker container, uploads SARIF to GitHub Code Scanning.
notes: Uses --config auto (community rulesets). No SEMGREP_APP_TOKEN — anonymous mode. Container image pinned by tag (not SHA); note in file acknowledges this with instruction to update periodically.

name: sonarcloud.yml
purpose: SonarCloud quality gate and security hotspot analysis; reads config from sonar-project.properties; skips fork PRs where SONAR_TOKEN unavailable.
notes: Requires SONAR_TOKEN GitHub secret + sonar-project.properties with org/projectKey. Sanitize: update sonar-project.properties with new project's key/org. Layer 0+ item 0g.

name: CLAUDE.md
purpose: Primary AI context file loaded every turn; defines stack, security rules, behavioral guardrails, anti-patterns, coding standards, and agent/skill triggers for JASON-OS.
notes: Project-specific content: JASON-OS identity, SoNash origin reference, Layer 0+ items. Sanitize before porting: strip project name, replace SoNash references, update version/date. Architecture section is TBD placeholder.

name: SESSION_CONTEXT.md
purpose: Human-facing session continuity doc tracking current session counter, uncommitted work status, last session summary, and next-session goals.
notes: Ephemeral project state — not a template artifact. Schema (session counter, status block, goals block) could be extracted as a reusable template; content is JASON-OS-specific. A new project would start from a blank template.

name: LICENSE
purpose: MIT License granting unrestricted use, copy, modify, distribute rights for JASON-OS under copyright of TalkHard (2026).
notes: Sanitize before porting: update copyright holder and year. License type choice (MIT) may need to remain consistent downstream.

name: settings.json (non-hooks)
purpose: Claude Code project settings: permission allow/deny lists, env vars for experimental features, MCP server config, and statusLine command.
notes: MCP server names (sonarcloud, memory, sequential-thinking, context7, episodic-memory) are user/project-specific — consuming project must match their own MCP server configurations. EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS env var enables team agents. Hooks section (lines 35-113) excluded — owned by D3.

name: package.json
purpose: Minimal Node.js package manifest: declares husky as sole dev dependency for git hook management; no runtime dependencies.

scripts.prepare: husky || echo 'Husky not available; skipping hook install'

notes: Sanitize: update name field to consuming project name. Version, private flag, and husky dep are portable. The prepare script gracefully skips if husky not available — defensive pattern worth preserving.

name: package-lock.json
purpose: Lockfile pinning exact husky package version for deterministic installs; auto-generated by npm.
notes: 798 bytes — unusually small (only husky, no transitive deps). File not fully read (auto-generated lockfile). Regenerated on `npm install` in any new project.

name: .nvmrc
purpose: Pins Node.js version to 22 for nvm/volta/fnm-based environments; ensures consistent runtime for hooks and scripts.
notes: Single-value file ('22\n'). Version matches CLAUDE.md §1 declaration. Universal pattern — copy as-is or bump version for newer LTS.

name: .gitignore
purpose: Excludes OS artifacts, language build outputs, env/secrets files, and project-specific Claude Code local state from git tracking.
notes: Sanitize: remove tools/statusline/ entries if consuming project does not use the statusline tool. Claude Code state entries (.claude/state/, .claude/tmp/, etc.) are universal for any JASON-OS consumer. Multi-language exclusions (python, go) reflect potential downstream stacks — useful to keep.

name: .gitattributes
purpose: Enforces LF line endings on checkin for all text files; marks known binary types to prevent munging; eliminates Windows CRLF noise.
notes: Universal cross-platform policy. Copy as-is. Add project-specific binary types if needed (e.g., .wasm, .parquet). The eol=lf policy is critical for shell hooks on Windows checkouts.

name: _shared.sh
purpose: Shared infrastructure sourced by all husky hooks: EXIT trap chaining, SKIP_CHECKS helpers, SKIP_REASON enforcement, and per-hook audit log path.

existing_metadata.skip_reason_constraints: single-line, no CR/LF, no control chars

notes: Sanitized from SoNash. Per CLAUDE.md §4.14: SKIP_REASON discipline enforced here (no autonomous skip). POSIX-compliant sh (not bash). Copy as-is to any JASON-OS consumer.

name: pre-commit
purpose: Pre-commit hook running gitleaks secrets detection on staged files; blocks commit if secrets found, advisory-only if gitleaks not installed.
notes: Foundation minimum only — 14+ additional checks planned (per D36-revised comment in file header). Each will be a single-line addition. No project-specific paths or tokens; portable as-is.

name: pre-push
purpose: Pre-push hook enforcing two gates: (1) escalation-gate blocking push if unacknowledged error-severity warnings exist, (2) block direct push to main/master branch.
notes: Inline Node.js script reads .claude/hook-warnings.json and .claude/state/hook-warnings-ack.json. Skips escalation-gate in CI (CI=true). POSIX subshell limitation worked around with stdin capture before subshell. 11+ additional checks planned. No project-specific tokens.

name: sonar-project.properties
purpose: SonarCloud project configuration consumed by sonarcloud.yml workflow; declares projectKey, organization, sources, encoding, and exclusion paths.
notes: Must sanitize projectKey and organization fields for any consuming project. Exclusion paths (.research, .planning) are JASON-OS-specific — adjust to match consuming project's doc/artifact directories.
